\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}

\begin{equation} \text{ParticleSpecies} = \text{Photon} \coprod \text{Electron} \coprod \text{CooperPair} \coprod \text{Magnon} \coprod \text{Phonon} \coprod \text{Polariton} \end{equation}
